Request Summary: Tight repo repair slice
Workflow Hint: repo-coding-task

lane: repo-repair
- goal: close one review finding and stop
- current phase: review-ready
- current assets: execution result / review summary
- missing: repaired patch / validation rerun

constraint: only touch src/ai_engineering_runtime/product_runtime.py

review expectation: keep the repair inside the cited files and rerun validation
